svg.title: PL datapath — tiled matrix multiplication
svg.desc: Left-to-right: DDR → AXI DMA MM2S → Ping-Pong BRAM → PE Array → AXI DMA S2MM → DDR. Controller FSM below orchestrates all stages.
svg.text: PL datapath — tiled matrix multiplication accelerator
writes output C back to DDR
Tile loop sequencing · DMA start/done handshake · buffer bank select · PE enable
Orchestrates prefetch ↔ compute overlap across ping-pong banks
